blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 8,826 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
